page_content:
Formerly: EDPL750.

EDHI752 State Systems of Higher Education (3 Credits)

Creation, operation, alteration and evaluation of state systems of higher education. Campus autonomy versus public accountability. Analysis

of topics such as state planning, budget and program review, and administration of student aid and federal programs.

Credit Only Granted for. EDHI752, EDPL752, or EDPS752.
